duplicates.title: Daily Jump In Consumer Google Trends For Car Insurance Claims Signals Rising Stress In Discretionary Auto Spending

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily jump in google trends for emergency car battery replacement signals auto sector consumer stress

idea.title: Daily Jump In Consumer Google Trends For Car Insurance Claims Signals Rising Stress In Discretionary Auto Spending
idea.thesis: Increased searches for car insurance claims often indicate consumer financial strain impacting discretionary auto purchases. Consumer discretionary spending on autos is pressured by rising insurance claims and costs.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLY when daily Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' rises 20%+ from previous day
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLY when daily Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' rises 20%+ from previous day Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when searches decline by 10%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress topics frequently spike during insurance claim waves and weather events.

schema.idea: Daily jump in consumer Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' signals rising stress in discretionary auto spending
schema.behavior: Increased searches for car insurance claims often indicate consumer financial strain impacting discretionary auto purchases.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending on autos is pressured by rising insurance claims and costs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when daily Google Trends for 'car insurance claims' rises 20%+ from previous day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when searches decline by 10%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress topics frequently spike during insurance claim waves and weather events.

duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Electronics Repair Signals Tech Consumer Stress Rebound

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Electronics Repair Signals Tech Consumer Stress Rebound
idea.thesis: Rising interest in DIY electronics repair reflects consumer stress leading to deferred professional repairs, indicating tech sector pressure. Tech sector revenues may soften when consumers shift to DIY fixes.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLK when weekly Google Trends for 'DIY electronics repair' rises 30%+ week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLK when weekly Google Trends for 'DIY electronics repair' rises 30%+ week-over-week Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when trend falls below 10% increase
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer repair interest spikes seasonally and with economic stress cycles.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'DIY electronics repair' signals tech consumer stress rebound
schema.behavior: Rising interest in DIY electronics repair reflects consumer stress leading to deferred professional repairs, indicating tech sector pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Tech sector revenues may soften when consumers shift to DIY fixes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLK when weekly Google Trends for 'DIY electronics repair' rises 30%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when trend falls below 10% increase

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer repair interest spikes seasonally and with economic stress cycles.

idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLI when daily Google Trends for 'emergency vehicle repair' rises 35%+ day-over-day Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when searches decline by 15%

idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle repair emergencies spike often due to accidents and weather.
